item.title: AMD is falling behind, warns this analyst who says other chip stocks are better bets
item.description: AMD’s reliance on third-party networking and a lagging software stack may pose problems for the semiconductor company, according to D.A. Davidson.

item.title: Rivian’s stock jumps 20% as investors cheer 2026 growth potential
item.description: Rivian expects to deliver up to 67,000 EVs this year but could dole out more than $2.1 billion on capital expenditures as it expands its roadmap.

item.title: Why Bank of America says 30-year Treasurys are the best hedge for investors
item.description: Futher strenghtening in the Japanese yen would be detrimental to risk-on assets as traders unwind the carry-trade

item.title: Steel stocks are falling as they get a taste of the ‘TACO trade’
item.description: Steel and aluminum stocks were falling after an FT report that President Donald Trump is softening his stance on tariffs — a subject of consumer compl...

item.title: The weirdest way to invest in Claude maker Anthropic is rallying again after funding round
item.description: A $30 billion funding round by Anthropic, maker of the popular Claude large language model, led to gains for a far-flung investor in premarket trade o...
